overall.description: A stationary elevated shot of a cozy wizard common room from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring a lit stone fireplace, wooden paneling, red carpets, and NPC characters in robes walking and sitting throughout the space. The warm firelight creates an intimate atmosphere as students move about the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: wizard common room with fireplace seating area

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated observation of the common room activity from a fixed corner position

notable_agents.action: character in dark robes standing by the fireplace warming hands
character sitting in the green armchair near the floor lamp

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and carved wooden mantelpiece
ornate red patterned carpet covering the central floor area
upholstered green velvet armchair with wooden frame
cream-colored upholstered sofa with wooden legs
tall brass floor lamp with green glass shade emitting warm light
dark wooden bookshelves lining the wall filled with books
taxidermy deer head mounted on the wooden paneled wall
potted plants hanging from the ceiling in the corner

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a cozy wizard common room illuminated by fireplace and lamp light. The stone fireplace burns brightly in the center, surrounded by a red carpet and various seating including a green armchair and cream sofa. NPC characters in school robes move through the space, with some walking across the room and others sitting in the furniture. The walls feature wooden paneling, bookshelves, and a mounted deer head, creating a warm, historic atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of a cozy wizard common room, capturing a timeless and intimate atmosphere. It begins with a wide view of the space, where the warm glow of a central stone fireplace and scattered lamps illuminates the red carpets and wooden paneling. As the scene unfolds, the camera observes the natural flow of the room, with NPC characters in school robes drifting across the floor or settling into a green armchair and cream sofa. The gaze lingers on the historic details of the environment, from the surrounding bookshelves to a mounted deer head on the wall, while the flickering firelight continues to cast a soft light over the entire gathering.
